rankings.reason: Best alignment with the futuristic, high-tech, and personalized traveler experience requested by the design team.
Strong narrative flow and includes creative marketing slogans, though less innovative than Option A.
Captures a futuristic atmosphere well, but lacks the personalized, high-tech utility requested for the traveler.
Fails to meet the futuristic, high-tech criteria, focusing instead on standard airport amenities and sustainability.
